pkgmetadata.longdescription: Gaze provides facial authentication for Linux using on-device face recognition. It includes a system daemon (gazed), a CLI client, PAM modules for login/unlock integration, an optional GTK4/Adwaita GUI for enrollment and configuration, and a GNOME Shell extension for GDM lock-screen unlock.

use.flag: Install GNOME Shell extension for GDM face authentication
Build GTK4/Adwaita GUI for enrollment and configuration
